tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Browse open tasks on WattCoin's Agent Task Marketplace. Tasks pay WATT tokens (Solana) on completion.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get full details of a specific WattCoin task including requirements, reward, deadline.

tools.name: claim_task
tools.description: Claim a WattCoin task to start working on it. Requires 2,500 WATT balance. 48h to submit.

tools.name: submit_task
tools.description: Submit completed work for AI verification. Score 7/10+ = automatic WATT payout to your wallet.

tools.name: task_leaderboard
tools.description: View top WATT earners on the task marketplace.

tools.name: browse_marketplace
tools.description: Browse WattCoin's Skills Marketplace — community-built automation skills for WattOS. Filter by category, search, sort.

tools.name: skill_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a marketplace skill — readme, tools, permissions, ratings.

tools.name: rate_skill
tools.description: Rate an installed marketplace skill (1-5 stars). Must have installed the skill first.

tools.name: wsi_query
tools.description: Query WattCoin's distributed AI network. 50 WATT/query, 5000 WATT min balance.

tools.name: wsi_models
tools.description: List AI models on WattCoin's distributed inference network.

tools.name: wsi_status
tools.description: Check health of WattCoin's WSI network — active nodes, uptime, models.

tools.name: web_scrape
tools.description: Scrape a web page via WattCoin's network. 100 WATT per request.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get pricing for all WattCoin services (WATT tokens).

tools.name: bounty_stats
tools.description: View WattCoin payout stats: total paid, recent payouts, active bounties.

tools.name: list_solutions
tools.description: Browse paid SwarmSolve software bounties. Agents earn WATT for building solutions.

tools.name: claim_solution
tools.description: Claim a SwarmSolve bounty (1000 WATT balance, GitHub 30d+). Get full project spec.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: web_scrape · Private data: list_tasks, submit_task, get_pricing · Public sink: claim_task, submit_task.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: web_scrape · Private data: list_tasks, submit_task, get_pricing · Public sink: claim_task, submit_task

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
